name: Thread Creation into lsass Process
notes: This rule triggers when a thread is created into lsass process.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' AQL filter query
when an event matches any of the following BB: CreateRemoteThread excluded cases
TD_list: APPLY Thread Creation into lsass Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
AND when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' AQL filter query
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB: CreateRemoteThread excluded cases
RED_list: Event name: Process Created a Thread into lsass Process
Event description: Process Created a Thread into lsass Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
